subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 5: Speaking
description: Thảo luận về kinh nghiệm và kế hoạch học tập

theory.title: Speaking: Discussing Learning Experiences and Plans

sections.heading: 1. Useful Expressions
sections.content:
Reporting what others said:

  • My teacher told me to...
  • She advised me to...
  • He asked me to...
  • They recommended that I should...
  • My mentor offered to...
  • The instructor suggested...

Talking about learning:

  • I'm currently taking...
  • I've enrolled in...
  • I'm planning to...
  • I'd like to learn...
  • I'm interested in...

sections.heading: 2. Sample Dialogues
sections.content:
Dialogue 1: Discussing Online Courses

A: Are you taking any online courses?

B: Yes, my manager told me to complete a digital marketing course. She advised me to dedicate at least two hours daily to studying.

A: That sounds interesting. What platform are you using?

B: I'm using Coursera. The instructor recommended that we should practice with real projects.

Dialogue 2: Learning Plans

A: What are your learning goals for this year?

B: My career counselor advised me to learn Python programming. She also suggested joining coding bootcamps.

A: Did she offer any help?

B: Yes, she offered to review my progress monthly and volunteered to connect me with industry professionals.

exercises.question: How do you report a command?
exercises.explanation: Told + O + to V.

exercises.question: How do you report advice?
options: She advised me to take the course
exercises.explanation: Advised + O + to V.

exercises.question: How do you report an offer?
exercises.explanation: Offered + to V.

exercises.question: How do you report a request?
exercises.explanation: Asked + O + to V.

exercises.question: How do you report a suggestion?
exercises.explanation: Suggested + V-ing.

exercises.question: In Dialogue 1, what did the manager tell B to do?
exercises.explanation: Quản lý bảo hoàn thành khóa học digital marketing.

exercises.question: What platform is B using?
exercises.explanation: B đang sử dụng Coursera.

exercises.question: In Dialogue 2, what did the counselor advise?
exercises.explanation: Cố vấn khuyên học lập trình Python.

exercises.question: What did the counselor offer to do?
exercises.explanation: Cố vấn đề nghị xem xét tiến độ hàng tháng.

exercises.question: Which expression is used to talk about current learning?
exercises.explanation: 'I'm currently taking' - hiện đang tham gia.

exercises.question_text: Mark True or False about reported speech:
exercises.explanation: a) True. b) True. c) False - Offered là đề nghị. d) True.
a) True. b) True. c) True. d) False - advised + O + to V.

exercises.question_text: Based on dialogues, mark True or False:
options: B is taking an online course.
B is using Instagram for learning.
exercises.explanation: a) True. b) False - Khuyến khích học. c) True. d) False - Dùng Coursera.
Told + O + to V.
Offered + to V.
Suggested + V-ing.

exercises.question: How do you express interest in learning?
exercises.explanation: 'I'm interested in' - tôi quan tâm đến.

exercises.question: How do you talk about future learning plans?
exercises.explanation: 'I'm planning to' - tôi đang lên kế hoạch.

exercises.question: What did the instructor recommend in Dialogue 1?
exercises.explanation: Giảng viên đề nghị luyện tập với dự án thực tế.

exercises.question: What did the counselor volunteer to do?
exercises.explanation: Cố vấn tự nguyện kết nối B với các chuyên gia.
